Global (All).title: US Senate Votes to Ban TikTok from Federal Devices Over Security Concerns
Global (All).summary: The US Senate has voted to ban TikTok from all federal devices due to security concerns.

Global (All).title: Russian Hacker Arrested in Poland Over Colonial Pipeline Attack
Global (All).summary: A Russian hacker was arrested in Poland in connection with the 2021 Colonial Pipeline attack.

Global (All).title: US Imposes Sanctions on Chinese Officials Over Human Rights Abuses
Global (All).summary: The US has imposed sanctions on Chinese officials over human rights abuses in Xinjiang.

United States.title: Rise in COVID-19 cases due to new variants threatens healthcare system
United States.summary: The recent surge in COVID-19 cases in parts of the US poses a significant threat to the country's healthcare system, with hospitals in some areas reaching capacity.

United States.title: Tensions escalates between US and China over Taiwan relations
United States.summary: The US and China have increased their military presence near Taiwan, heightening tensions between the two nations and sparking concerns about a potential conflict.

United States.title: Gun violence continues to plague US cities, with multiple shootings reported
United States.summary: A series of shootings in major US cities over the past week have resulted in multiple fatalities, highlighting the ongoing issue of gun violence in the country.

South Korea.title: Seoul's Yongsan District Cancels 4th Korea-Friendly Festival Due to Public Backlash Over Participation from US Army
South Korea.summary: A festival was canceled after the participation of the US Army sparked outrage in South Korea.

South Korea.title: South Korea to Introduce Law Requiring Crypto Exchanges to Store User Data
South Korea.summary: South Korea will introduce a law requiring crypto exchanges to store user data, amidst growing scrutiny of the industry.

South Korea.title: South Korea Imposes 10% Tariff on US Steel Amid Trade Dispute
South Korea.summary: South Korea has imposed a 10% tariff on US steel as trade tensions between the two countries escalate.

Japan.summary: Typhoon warnings in place for eastern Japan as of June 12, 2024,  with no reported injuries or damage reported as of yet

June 17, 2024: Protests against the ongoing Japanese government's handling of the economy continued in cities across Japan. The situation remained relatively peaceful, with the main incidents being arrests of protesters in Tokyo for breaching local regulations. However, the protests had no major impact on the economy or the general public.
June 18, 2024: North Korea test-fired an intercontinental ballistic missile towards Japan and the US Pacific territory of Guam but no missile damage reported over either areas as of yet
